column3:
Do you consider yourself an introvert or extrovert?
On a scale from 1-10: with "1" being extremely introverted...........and "10" being extremely extroverted. Definitions from merriam-webster.com: An introvert is "a reserved or shy person who enjoys spending time alone"; an extrovert is "a gregarious and unreserved person"
